series_metadata.series_description: Official Certifications issued by the Board of Elections showing the results of ongoing Local Option Elections. These certifications are used to determine the issuance of Liquor Permits in a particular area, as to WET or DRY status. (fna PM-207)

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in the office area for 5 years then microfilm. Destroy after the microfilm is checked for quality and completeness. ; Microform: Retain a diazo copy in the office area permanently. Retain the master microfilm in off-site storage permanently., Paper: Recycle ; Microform: Permanent
